title: lichen_l2.c:1867 peer_try_all_pubkeys modifies ctx without restore on all paths
description: Contract violation: peer_try_all_pubkeys() - On success path (lines 589-600), ctx->peer_pubkey and ctx->peer_eui64 are set to the matched peer. On -LICHEN_EAUTH failure (line 606), they are restored to saved values. But on non-auth errors (line 580-585), the ctx is restored. Actually, looking closely: lines 581-583 restore before return. This is correct. On success, ctx is intentionally modified. No bug.
close_reason: Not a bug: Function correctly restores ctx on error paths and intentionally modifies ctx on success path.
